---
name: vite-react-typescript
description: "Use when configuring or troubleshooting Vite + React + TypeScript projects, including plugin setup, strict typing, and build validation."
---

# Vite React TypeScript

## Goals
- Keep dev startup fast and builds reliable.
- Maintain strict TypeScript safety.

## Checklist
- Keep Vite plugins explicit in `vite.config.ts`.
- Use ESM imports consistently.
- Validate changes with `npm run build` after setup edits.
- Respect strict compiler settings and remove dead code.
- Keep starter templates minimal and project-focused.
